description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per GitHub Actions workflow across every repo in an org (or user). StateBackedComponent — discovery cached to disk. Materializing an asset reads the most recent workflow runs and emits a DataFrame with status / conclusion / event / actor metadata.

owner_env_var.label: Owner Env Var
owner_env_var.description: Env var with GitHub org name or username.

token_env_var.label: Token Env Var
token_env_var.description: Env var with a GitHub PAT (repo + workflow scopes) or GITHUB_TOKEN.

workflow_selector.label: Workflow Selector
workflow_selector.description: Fivetran-shape selector for workflows within selected repos.

recent_runs_limit.label: Recent Runs Limit
recent_runs_limit.description: How many recent workflow runs to fetch per asset materialize.
